case_title: MAURIZIO BARONE VS. SONDRA KOHN et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARONE, MAURIZIO JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 7.0 DAYS
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-12-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL FOR FAILURE TO FILE AND SERVE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER RE: DEMURRER AS TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR/DISMISSAL ON FILE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: PATRICK HEARD, CSR#11055. (212)

REPLY TO PL'S OPPOSITION TO DFS' DEMURRERS TO PL'S VERIFIED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT KOHN, SONDRA KOHN, SONDRA AS TRUSTEE FOR THE ESTATE OF SANFORD ERIC SCHNOLL ANEU PRO SKIN AND LASER CENTER SAETA HOLDINGS LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS SONDRA KOHN, SONDRA KOHN, ANEU PRO SKIN AND LASER CENTER AND SAETA HOLDINGS, L.L.C.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COMPLAINT CONFIRMS PLAINTIFF'S KNOWLEDGE OF THE ADMINISTRATION OF THE ESTATE IN JUNE 2006. UNDER PROBATE CODE SECTION 9100, PLAINTIFF WAS REQUIRED TO FILE A CLAIM WITHIN THE LATER OF FOUR MONTHS AFTER THE APPOINTMENT OF A REPRESENTATIVE OR SIXTY DAYS. BOTH PERIODS HAVE LONG SINCE PASSED. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
